Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to group low level events from a manufacturing event log into higher level process steps There is a sample event log provided for cases A1 and B2 which seem very similar

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Based on the event sequences I see a clear progression from material handling through fabrication and quality control

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For case A1 the first five events form a natural Material Preparation phase retrieving the sheet scanning its barcode placing it on the table aligning it and preheating it all happen in quick 15 second succession by operators and machines working together to ready the part
